message:
tests: compaction pipeline save/open round-trip and multi-pass tests

New compaction test coverage:

compaction_pipeline_save_and_open_round_trip_rehydrates_compaction_context:
- Creates session with tool call history
- Runs compaction to generate summary
- Saves session to JSONL file
- Reopens session and verifies:
  - Summary is preserved and accessible
  - Compaction context (first_kept_entry_id) is correct
  - Messages exclude compacted history
  - Tool call details in compaction entry

compaction_pipeline_second_pass_seeds_previous_details_and_updates_summary:
- Sets up session with first compaction pass
- Adds more conversation and tool calls
- Runs second compaction pass
- Verifies:
  - Previous summary is seeded to new compaction
  - Tool call details accumulate across passes
  - read_files and modified_files merge correctly
  - New summary replaces old

Test artifacts:
- Session JSONL files (before/after compaction)
- Compaction pipeline logs
- Artifact index for debugging

Uses sha2::Sha256 for summary hashing to detect content changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
